createSurvey(string,string,string,addres.details: Create a survey. If the pool does not exist yet, it is created      implicitly and msg.sender is recorded as the pool's Safe.      Always Safe-executed (msg.sender = Safe address).      New pool (poolId not yet registered):        - Pool is bootstrapped with msg.sender as the owning Safe        - batchIds are registered for the new pool      Existing pool:        - msg.sender must be the pool's Safe        - batchIds are ignored (use registerBatch() for new print runs)

params.batchIds: Batch wallet addresses — only used when bootstrapping a new pool
params.ipfsCid: IPFS content identifier for survey metadata
params.poolId: Pool this survey belongs to (created if new)

isPoolMember(string,address).details: Check if an address is a registered member of a pool.      Used by Lit Protocol as an access condition.      :userAddress resolves to the pool wallet EOA.

registerBatch(string,address).details: Register an additional batch wallet for an existing pool.      Called by the pool's Safe (governance tx).      For initial batches, pass them in createSurvey() when bootstrapping the pool.

registerInPool(string,string,address,byt.details: Validate a card and register the pool wallet EOA as a pool member.      Called by the respondent's SMC (gas abstraction layer).      Identity resolved via ISMC(msg.sender).owner() → pool wallet EOA.

params.batchId: Batch wallet address this card belongs to
params.nullifier: Unique card identifier from QR code
params.signature: Signature of (nullifier | batchId) by the batch wallet

updateSurvey(string,string).details: Update survey IPFS CID. Must be Safe-executed by the pool's Safe.
